Attr.AllowedFrameTargets TYPE: lookup DEFAULT: array() --DESCRIPTION-- Lookup table of all allowed link frame targets. Some commonly used link targets include _blank, _self, _parent and _top. Values should be lowercase, as validation will be done in a case-sensitive manner despite W3C's recommendation. XHTML 1.0 Strict does not permit the target attribute so this directive will have no effect in that doctype. XHTML 1.1 does not enable the Target module by default, you will have to manually enable it (see the module documentation for more details.) --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
